articles.author: Ashley Mowreader
articles.title: Where Americans can expect to see air, health impacts from wildfires - NBC News
articles.description: As heat waves and wildfire smoke sweep the country, see where it could be affecting you on the map and what you can do to curb the health risks.
articles.content: In response, public health officials have issued air quality advisories and suspended some government operations. New York launched emergency operations Wednesday, offering free KN95 masks and openin… [+2389 chars]
